title: Runtime error in podman info
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
 `Panic: runtime error` on `podmain info` on Fedora
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.
podmain info

**Describe the results you received:**
```
[eduan@fedora ~]$ podman info
panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1

goroutine 1 [running]:
panic(0x5647eb689360, 0xc000132198)
```
